reviews.comment: Rude staff. A guy working there, name is Azmal asked us to leave,  not for any reason just because we ordered two coffees between 3 people and sat there chatting. Just absolutely shocking and horrible service.

reviewReply.comment:
We’re truly sorry to hear about this experience. This is not the kind of interaction we ever want our guests to have, and your feedback has been taken very seriously. We’re looking into this internally to understand what may have gone wrong.

We’d really appreciate the chance to connect with you directly and hear more details. Please DM us on Instagram @coffee.island.in or write to us at hello@coffeeisland.in, so our team can follow up personally.

reviews.comment: Today I visited coffee island in the morning and was truly shocked ( In a good way!)to see one employee handling the ground floor and upstairs preparing beverages serving on the time and even taking table orders all simultaneously his energy level was unbelievable I asked his name was Sham...brilliant example of hard work combined with smart work truly impressive service and dedication coffee Island is lucky to have him

reviewReply.comment: Thank you for sharing this wonderful experience! We’re truly glad you were impressed by the dedication, energy, and seamless service. Feedback like this means a lot to us, and we look forward to welcoming you again soon.
